executives.name: Amy Hood
executives.background: Amy Hood is Microsoft’s executive vice president and chief financial officer. She is responsible for leading the company’s worldwide finance organization, including acquisitions, treasury activities, tax planning, accounting and reporting, and internal audit and investor relations.

executives.name: Ashish Khandpur
executives.background: President and CEO of Reliance Worldwide Corporation. Former President and CEO of Victaulic and former executive at 3M Company.

tenure_dates.title: Group President, Transportation and Electronics Business Group; Chief Technology Officer

executives.name: Dambisa Moyo
executives.background: Co-principal of Versaca Investments. Director since 2016.

executives.name: Gregory Page
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Cargill, Inc.
